author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Sprint VD.1 — Mask R-CNN per torchvision.models.detection.maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn.

Scope:
1. mask_rcnn.rs — MaskRcnn struct wrapping FasterRcnn + mask_head (4-conv FCN) + mask_predictor (1-conv, num_classes output channels).
2. detection/mod.rs — pub mod mask_rcnn + re-exports.
3. models/mod.rs — re-export MaskRcnn + maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn.
4. lib.rs — re-export MaskRcnn + maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn.
5. models/registry.rs — register 'maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn'.
6. ferrotorch-hub/src/registry.rs — add hub entry for pretrained lookup.
7. tests/conformance_vision_detection.rs — extend with Mask R-CNN conformance tests (M-series).
8. scripts/regenerate_vision_fixtures.py — extend with Mask R-CNN fixture generation.

Architecture (per torchvision 0.21.x):
- MaskHead: 4x Conv2d(256,256,3,pad=1) + ReLU, produces [N, 256, roi_H, roi_W].
- MaskPredictor: ConvTranspose2d(256,256,2,stride=2) + ReLU + Conv2d(256,num_classes,1), outputs [N, num_classes, 28, 28].
- ROI Align for masks uses output_size=14 (vs 7 for detection), sampling_ratio=2.
- MaskRcnn.forward() reuses FasterRcnn sub-modules (backbone+fpn+rpn+detection head) and then runs mask_head + mask_predictor on the same ROIs.

Key decision: Mask R-CNN re-uses Sprint C.1 components (backbone, FPN, RPN, ROI Align) from faster_rcnn.rs. The mask branch runs on separate ROI-aligned features at 14x14 resolution.

Acceptance criteria:
- Forward produces MaskDetections { boxes, scores, labels, masks } where masks shape is [N_det, num_classes, 28, 28].
- Workspace build + clippy --workspace --all-targets clean.
- Conformance tests M1-M6 pass.
- crosslink issue #964 closed via this work.
